sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60013" key="krioke/ratos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κρῑο-κέρᾱτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n60013.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with ram's horns</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θεός</foreign> Ps.- Callisth.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
